Daniel Bonin

IT Professional & Cybersecurity Specialist

SITE UNDER ACTIVE CONSTRUCTION

About Me

System Operations | Cybersecurity
IT Helpdesk | Network Engineer

Hi, I'm Dan!

I bring together experience in operations, cybersecurity, and support to help people and systems work better together.

Find out more about me What I'm working on now

With a diverse background in System Operations and Cybersecurity, I build and protect robust network infrastructures. I pair this technical expertise with years of IT Helpdesk and Customer Service experience, ensuring that systems not only run securely but that the people using them feel fully supported. Whether I'm mitigating a security threat or walking a client through a troubleshooting process, my goal is always efficiency, safety, and satisfaction.

Work Experience

FIS | Systems Operations Engineer | 4 years

UW Madison | DoIT Helpdesk Software Developer and Support Specialist | 3 years

Target | Electronics Department | 4 years

  • Download Resume
What I Deliver

System Operations

Managed and maintained enterprise-level server environments. Focused on minimizing downtime, optimizing system performance, automating routine administrative tasks, and ensuring operational efficiency.

Cybersecurity

Implemented security protocols to defend against vulnerabilities and data breaches. Conducted regular threat assessments, network monitoring, and educated staff on best practices for data safety.

IT Helpdesk

Provided Tier 1 and Tier 2 technical support for hardware and software issues. Streamlined ticketing systems to improve response times and efficiently resolved daily technical blockers for end-users.

Customer Service

Translated complex technical jargon into clear, actionable advice for non-technical clients. Maintained a high satisfaction rating by approaching every interaction with patience and a problem-solving mindset.
